channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Rivals season 2 review: Jilly Cooper bonkbuster is still as steamy as ever — but troubling tensions take over in first three-episode release
item.description: We've only got three episodes of Rivals season 2 releasing in the near future — but boy has the Hulu and Disney+ show's return made an unforgettable impression.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, May 11 (game #1568)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, May 11 (game #1065)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, May 11 (game #799)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Samsung's Bespoke update is big step towards a useful AI for your fridge
item.description: Running a software upgrade on a fridge feels strange, but these are the times we live in.

item.title: I'm impressed that Microsoft keeps on improving PowerToys with smart additions — but I wonder why the newest monitor trick isn't in Windows 11 by default
item.description: Power Display is a smart add-on that's arrived in the PowerToys suite of utilities, accompanied by another equally useful tool.
